configurations.name: IARA
runtimeArgs: cd 'C:\Users\oseia\Downloads\BCS'; $listener = [System.Net.HttpListener]::new(); $listener.Prefixes.Add('http://localhost:3000/'); $listener.Start(); Write-Host 'Server started on port 3000'; while($listener.IsListening){ $ctx = $listener.GetContext(); $path = $ctx.Request.Url.LocalPath; if($path -eq '/' -or $path -eq ''){ $path = '/index.html' }; $file = 'C:\Users\oseia\Downloads\BCS' + $path.Replace('/','\'  ); if(Test-Path $file){ $bytes = [System.IO.File]::ReadAllBytes($file); $ctx.Response.ContentLength64 = $bytes.Length; $ctx.Response.OutputStream.Write($bytes,0,$bytes.Length) }; $ctx.Response.Close() }
